case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. GENTLE PARKING LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GENTLE PARKING LLC ORTIZ-CARTAGENA, WILLIAM AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENTLE PARKING LLC ORTIZ-CARTAGENA, WILLIAM AN INDIVIDUAL $11,425.41 PRINCIPAL, $5,488.39 INTEREST, $2,237.60 TAX PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,151.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
